title: Where?
content:
Where is my love - 
     In silence and shadow she lies,
 Under the April-grey, calm waste of the skies;
        And a bird above,
     In the darkness tender and clear,
 Keeps saying over and over, Love lies here!

        Not that she's dead;
     Only her soul is flown
 Out of its last pure earthly mansion;
        And cries instead
     In the darkness, tender and clear,
 Like the voice of a bird in the leaves, Love - love lies here.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter De La Mare delivers a powerful performance in "Where?"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
